name: mbn-theme/hero
title: Hero
description: Full-width hero section with an editable eyebrow, bold headline, supporting copy, and background image treatment.

eyebrow.description: Short uppercase label displayed above the main heading.

heading.default: Built to Protect Those at Risk.

body.default: We help at-risk people and institutions access protection, training, and readiness support.
body.description: Supporting paragraph shown below the heading.

backgroundImageId.description: WordPress attachment ID for the hero background image.

backgroundImageUrl.description: Resolved URL for the hero background image.

backgroundImageAlt.description: Alternative text for the hero background image.

overlayOpacity.description: Opacity of the dark image overlay from 0 to 1.

contentMaxWidth.description: Maximum width of the text content column in pixels.

attributes.heading: Built to Protect Those at Risk.
attributes.body: We help at-risk people and institutions access protection, training, and readiness support.
